subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great connecting at the conference, and I'd be glad to explore how we might work together.

I'm open to a 30-minute call next week. Could you send over a few time slots that work for you, along with your timezone? I'll confirm what fits best on our end.

As for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm not in a position to share those. If a senior-level technical discussion makes sense after our initial meeting, I'd be happy to help coordinate the right introductions from our side.

Talk soon.

Best regards
